info.title: Ecomapp-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp-buildTime is an e-commerce platform API designed to manage products, orders, and customer interactions efficiently.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, retrieval, update, and deletion of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for handling customer orders, order status, and order history.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer information, profile updates, and customer-related operations.

tags.name: authentication
tags.description: Authentication and authorization operations including login, logout, and token management.

post.summary: Add an item to a user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must contain the details of the cart item to add. The response returns the updated cart state.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

200.description: Item successfully added to the cart

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input data

example.message: The cart item provided is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Product ID is required and must be a valid string.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the current items in a user's shopping cart
get.description: Fetches the current list of items in the shopping cart for the user identified by userId. Returns the full cart response detailing products and quantities.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart items

400.description: Bad request due to invalid userId parameter

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Place an order on behalf of a specified user. The request initiates the order creation process and returns the order details upon success.

requestBody.description: Details of the order to be placed

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid order data or parameters

example.message: The order data provided is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: At least one order item is required

example.message: The specified user ID does not exist.

details.issue: No user exists with this ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetch detailed information about an order by specifying the unique order identifier. Returns order status, items, totals, and other metadata.

example.message: The provided order ID format is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID does not match expected format

example.message: No order found with the provided ID.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment transaction for a specified order or service. The request body includes the payment details required to process the payment. On success, returns payment confirmation and transaction details.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request containing necessary payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method.

400.description: Invalid payment initiation request. Check the request parameters and data.

example.message: Payment amount must be greater than zero and currency must be supported.

details.issue: Currency code is invalid or unsupported.

402.description: Payment required or failed due to insufficient funds or declined card.

example.message: Payment was declined or insufficient funds in the account.

500.description: Internal server error while processing the payment initiation.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive payment status updates via webhook
post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous notifications about payment status changes. The webhook payload contains information such as transaction ID, payment status, and relevant metadata.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload carrying payment update details sent from the payment gateway.

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or missing required fields.

example.message: Missing transactionId or status field in webhook data.

402.description: Payment required or payment update indicates a declined or failed payment.

example.message: The payment update shows a declined status.

500.description: Internal server error processing the webhook notification.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product in the product catalog. Provide all required product details in the request body. On success, returns the created product information with its unique identifier.

requestBody.description: Product data to create a new product

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: One or more product fields are invalid or missing

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product already exists with the same SKU

example.message: A product with the same SKU already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track a shipment by order ID
get.description: Retrieves the current tracking status and details for the shipment associated with the given order ID. Provides real-time updates on the shipping progress.

404.description: Order not found or no shipment available

example.message: No shipment tracking found for the specified order ID
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: This operation allows clients to create a new user account by providing the necessary user information in the request body. On success, it returns the details of the newly created user. It validates input data and ensures the user does not already exist.

200.description: Successfully registered a new user and returned user details.

example.message: Provided user data is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code in ISO 4217 format used for all monetary values in this item

discount.description: Discount amount applied on the product

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the product

price.description: Base price of a single unit of the product before discount

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart

currency.description: Currency code used for amounts in the cart

items.description: List of items available in the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user owning the cart

discount.description: Discount applied on the ordered product

finalPrice.description: Final price of the product after discount

price.description: Base price of the product before discount

productId.description: Unique ID of the ordered product

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

currency.description: Currency code used in the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Total payable amount for the order

paymentStatus.description: Payment status of the order (e.g., pending, completed)

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped)

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user who placed the order

currency.description: Currency in which payment is made

orderId.description: Identifier of the order for which payment is made

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway processing the payment

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment (e.g., credit_card, paypal)

currency.description: Currency in which payment was made

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with the payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction

status.description: Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed)

transactionId.description: Gateway's transaction identifier for payment tracking

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

paymentId.description: Identifier for the payment being referenced

transactionId.description: Identifier for the payment transaction from gateway

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category under which the product is classified

currency.description: Currency code for the price of the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

rating.description: Average user rating for the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available

category.description: Category under which the product is listed

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 creation date of the product record

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: High-quality noise-cancelling headphones with long battery life.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 last update date of the product record

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier assigned to the shipment

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

error.description: Short description of the server error

status.description: HTTP status code of the server error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the server error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request that caused the error
